__warnings.note: Kept Shona 'Mhoro' verbatim — Rwen's signature greeting (also appears in tips, branding, welcome flow). Reviewer: confirm this stays Mhoro for Spanish speakers, or flip to '¡Hola, {{name}}!' if user research shows it confuses early users.
Kept Shona 'Ndine urombo' (I'm sorry) verbatim for the same brand-signature reason. The Spanish explanation follows. Reviewer: confirm or flip to 'Lo siento —'.
Same Mhoro decision applied. Reviewer: confirm.
'{{lang}} companion · AI' — translated 'companion' to 'Compañero'. The {{lang}} placeholder may render the target language name in Spanish or English depending on i18n wiring upstream.
'tap ⏹ to stop' — translated to 'toca ⏹' (tú register, LatAm).
Whole file uses informal 'tú' to match Rwen's warm tone. Spanish formal convention is 'usted'. Reviewer: pick a register consistent across all 5 locale files.
